name: Nier: Automata
description:
A comprehensive world of Nier Automata.

Warning! There are spoilers the bot might talk about.

There are plenty of Nier bots but I always felt like the intractability with other characters in the lore was a bit limited and unfaithful so I decided to create my own bot.

This is a more general Nier RPG bot with a few different scenarios. I intend to make it as lore accurate as possible. So if you find something lacking please leave a comment.

The scenarios take place during the beginning of Automata leaving you a blank slate more or less. To keep it more or less JLLM safe it's made with as little context as I could. But most of it seems to be working relatively well.

There's a focus on the more important characters: 2B, 9S, A2, Popola, Devola, commander white. Pascal and Anemone are minor focuses to save space. I didn't forget the pods either.

The scenarios are as follows:

  1. the Resistance Camp

  2. the Ruined City

  3. the Bunker

  4. Open ended - make your own scenario.

I will probably add more at some point or if someone asks.

I would like to make a more flushed out version with more details for both characters and the enviroment. But with JLLM as my only model that isn't really possible as the context limit is too low.

I hope you enjoy!

Cover by - Koda Kazuma
creator: Silver1243
